DEMURRER
Off Calendar Oct-17-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS JAY COCHRANE AND COAST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY DEMURRER:
APPEAR: Edward R. Taylor, Esq. 661-8196 for pltf & opposing party; Michael P. Clark, Esq. 925/827-3300 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (DEMURRER BY COAST INSURANCE TO COMPLAINT 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENCE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO DUTY ON PART OF INSURANCE COMPANY TO PREVENT DEFENDANT FROM DRIVING). Deft to prepare order. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-17-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS JAY COCHRANE AND COAST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT:
APPEAR: Edward R. Taylor, Esq. 661-8196 for pltf & opposing party; Michael P. Clark, Esq. 925/827-3300 for defts & moving parties Jay Cochrane and Coast National Insurance Company.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES BY COCHRANE DENIED. ALLEGATIONS OF INTOXICATION SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT PUNITIVE CLAIMS.
MOTION TO STRIKE BY COAST MOOT SINCE DEMURRER SUSTAINED.
GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO PRESENCE OF OTHERS. DENY AS TO PRIOR ACCIDENT). Deft to prepare order. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2002 Continued To Nov-08-02 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Edward R. Taylor, Esq. 661-8196 for pltf & opposing party; Michael P. Clark, Esq. 925/827-3300 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLTF HAS NO STANDING TO SUE COAST INSURANCE UNTIL HE OBTAINS A JUDGMENT AGAINST THE INSURED. ANY AMENDMENT MUST COMPLY WITH CAL.RULE OF COURT 312(g)). 10 days to amend. Deft to prepare order. (AJR/JH)

MOTION To Strike Portions Of Complaint
